title: IoT Benchmark Pack Public Artifact
description: Public data, firmware, run metadata, and analysis scripts supporting a measurement-aware evaluation of heterogeneous IoT systems across Wi-Fi, Zigbee, BLE, and ESP32 Wi-Fi telemetry-energy experiments. The artifact includes sanitized measurement data and excludes local credentials, host-specific identifiers, manuscript drafts, and private environment files.

creators.name: Ishaq, Isam
creators.affiliation: College of Engineering, Al-Quds University, Abu Dis, Jerusalem, Palestine
